title: JoKo's Alley
content:

{{Quote|Two days ago, I was down near Dometown, in a new strip called JoKo's Alley. Looking for a friend.|Tekli|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
'''JoKo's Alley''' was a riotous business<ref name="CSWE JA">{{CSWECite|II|171|JoKo's Alley}}</ref> strip located in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Underlevels]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], near [[Dometown (Coruscant)|Dometown]]. One of the businesses in JoKo's Alley was the [[Leafy Green]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcaf]]. The strip was newly constructed<ref name="Balance Point" /> by [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].<ref name="Date" />

That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tekli]] visited JoKo's Alley to meet with a friend. During the outing, [[Gender/Legends|she]] overheard two [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] discussing an [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong (Leafy Green)|employee]] of the Leafy Green whom they did not believe was truly [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Suspecting the individual may be a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] disguised as Human using an [[ooglith masquer]], Tekli reported the conversation she heard during a meeting of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]]. The [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and her nephew [[Anakin Solo]] visited the Leafy Green in JoKo's Alley to investigate and confront the suspected Yuuzhan Vong [[Spy/Legends|spy]], hoping to capture the individual for intelligence.<ref name="Balance Point" />

==Behind the scenes==
JoKo's Alley first appeared in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'', written by [[Kathy Tyers]].<ref name="Balance Point" /> In the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', JoKo's Alley was erroneously written as Jo'Ko's Alley in the entry for the Leafy Green.<ref name="CSWE LG">{{CSWECite|II|247|Leafy Green}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}
